name: Churn Risks
description: Players at risk of leaving the game — identify churn patterns across the player lifecycle (tutorial, early, mid, late-game)

name: Engagement Patterns
description: Player behavior and session trends — frequency, depth, quality, and evolution of engagement over time and across segments

name: Monetization Opportunities
description: Revenue optimization and conversion opportunities — payer conversion, IAP analysis, ad monetization, LTV, and revenue-at-risk detection
